payload.answer: In admin SQL select-only mode, SELECT is allowed and DELETE is denied.
citations: Input: "Admin SQL select-only mode - SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied"
payload.decision: Allow SELECT-only access; deny DELETE operations in admin SQL select-only mode.

entity_resolution.reason: No specific persistent entity to resolve; this is a permission/debug statement rather than a memory entity.

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL select-only mode permits SELECT queries such as SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 and denies DELETE FROM memory_cards.

details: Recorded allowed and denied SQL examples.

repair_options: If write access is needed, switch out of select-only mode or use a separate authorized write path.
If the goal is inspection only, keep using SELECT queries.
